tabs.content:
.clear table copyDataLog data
.clear table datesConfig data
.clear materialized-view lastDatesConfig data

.show materialized-view ['lastDatesConfig']
tabs.title: Tab

tabs.content:
let processLog =
processExecutionLog
| where status in ("started","success","error","Started","Succeeded","Failed","failed")
| summarize
    startTime = minif(timestamp, tolower(status) == "started"),
    arg_max(timestamp, status, errorMessage)
  by model, batchExecution, processName
| project
    model, batchExecution, processName,
    startTime,
    endTime = timestamp,
    executionTime = timestamp - startTime,
    finalStatus = status;

let copyLog =
copyDataLog
|extend processName = objectName
|project model, batchExecution, processName,
    startTime = startDate,
    endTime = endDate,
    executionTime = endDate - startDate,
    finalStatus = status;

union processLog, copyLog
|order by startTime desc

// By Model/batch execution
processExecutionLog
| where tolower(status) in ("started","success","failed","succeeded","error")
| summarize
    startTime = minif(timestamp, tolower(status) == "started"),
    arg_max(timestamp, status),
    numberOfTasks = dcountif(processName, tolower(status) == "started")
  by model, batchExecution
| project
    model, batchExecution,
    startTime,
    endTime = timestamp,
    executionTime = timestamp - startTime,
    finalStatus = status,
    numberOfTasks
| order by startTime desc
tabs.title: Unified Log
